1.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
1.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
1.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

1.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
1.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

1.gl: Abshalom, a son of David; also (the fuller form) a later Israelite
1.dv: or (shortened) אַבְשָׁלוֹם ; from H1 (אָב) and H7965 (שָׁלוֹם); father of peace (i.e. friendly);

1.gl: to bolt, i.e. figuratively, to flee suddenly
1.kj: chase (away); drive away, fain, flee (away), put to flight, make haste, reach, run away, shoot.

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
2.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

2.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
2.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
2.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

2.gl: properly, to cast together , i.e. increase, especially in number; to multiply by the myriad
2.kj: increase, be many(-ifold), be more, multiply, ten thousands.
2.dv: a primitive root; (compare H7241 (רָבִיב)); also as denominative from H7233 (רְבָבָה);

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

3.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
3.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
3.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

3.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
3.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

4.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)

4.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)

4.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you

4.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

4.gl: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
4.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

4.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness

5.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
5.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
5.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

5.kj: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
5.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

5.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
5.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

5.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

6.gl: to prop (literally or figuratively); reflexively, to lean upon or take hold of (in a favorable or unfavorable sense)
6.kj: bear up, establish, (up-) hold, lay, lean, lie hard, put, rest self, set self, stand fast, stay (self), sustain.

6.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
6.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

6.gl: properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate

6.dv: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364 (יָקַץ)));

6.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
I, (as for) me, mine, myself, we, [idiom] which, [idiom] who.

7.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
7.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

7.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
7.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

7.gl: (as noun) a circle, neighbour, or environs; but chiefly (as adverb, with or without preposition) around
7.kj: (place, round) about, circuit, compass, on every side.

7.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
abundance (in number), i.e. (specifically) a myriad (whether definite or indefinite)

8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor

break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).
